errors.description: The referenced approvable_actions.action_key exists but is_active=false. Templates cannot target inactive actions.
action_key does not match `^[a-z][a-z0-9]*(\.[a-z][a-z0-9_]*)+$`.
The when_expression or selector_expression failed to parse via symfony/expression-language. Response includes the offending token position for the authoring UI to highlight.
Selector expression parsed but returns a type that isn't User[] / User / user_id string. E.g. an accidental when-expression saved as a selector.
The expression references a variable NOT declared in the action's context_variables_schema. Response names the offending variable.
Another active template exists for the same (tenant, application, action_key, name). Deactivate the peer first OR pick a different name.
Attempted to delete a template with approval_instances in status='pending'. Wait for instances to resolve OR withdraw them first.
Reached approval_templates_max_active slot cap. Response includes upgrade path.
approval_templates_custom entitlement is false (small-tier tenant). Response includes upgrade path.
Expression references a function gated by approval_advanced_expressions (manager_of, except, chain_up_to).
Attempted to approve/reject/withdraw an instance not in status='pending'.
Attempted to approve/reject a specific requirement not in status='pending' (already satisfied, failed, or still blocked by a sort_order predecessor).
Caller has an approval_decisions row on this requirement. Duplicate decisions refused by composite unique + observer.
Caller not in the requirement's resolved_approvers. Fires ApprovalSecurityViolation(violation_type='forged_decision') as a side-effect.
Attempted to withdraw an instance NOT submitted by the caller. Admin cannot withdraw on the requester's behalf (govern via reject with comment instead).
Template.allows_recall=false. Requesters cannot withdraw once submitted.
Reject decisions require a comment. SOC 2 CC6.3 evidence.
Reject comment shorter than approvals.security.min_reject_reason_length (default 10).
Caller matches requester_id AND template group.allows_self_approve=false (default). SOC 2 segregation-of-duties evidence.
ExpressionLanguageAdapter caught a parse/runtime/timeout error evaluating a selector at instance-create time. The instance IS NOT CREATED — the action refuses. Ops must fix the template.
Expression evaluation exceeded approvals.expression.timeout_ms wall-clock deadline. Usually indicates an over-complex expression or an infinite-loop bug in a custom selector function.

PCI-DSS scanner detected a regex match for cardholder data in context_json. Fires ApprovalSecurityViolation. The instance IS NOT CREATED — the action MUST strip cardholder data from approvalContext() output.
A decision landed on an already-decided instance/requirement — indicates a race that policy checks + observer both missed. Fires ApprovalSecurityViolation.

ApprovalInstanceExecutor dispatched the underlying action but the action threw. Instance is WEDGED (status='approved' AND executed_at IS NULL). Manual intervention via approvals:remediate-failed-executions.
PreflightTemplateInput.context_variables JSON exceeds approvals.templates.preflight_context_max_bytes.
Expression exceeds approvals.expression.max_expression_length.
Manual reminder-dispatch endpoint hit the throttle guard (> 3 reminders/hour to the same approver-requirement).
A user in resolved_approvers was suspended/deleted mid-flow AND their absence makes quorum unreachable. The instance transitions to rejected with this reason.
